textPlain: The “Astral from scratch guide“ idea really caught my eye.Gotta say that would be a pretty cool evolution of DIY electronics kits to OS kits
Well done and thanks for sharing, it's great to see people making a hobby OS and it's awesome that it plays Minecraft! How long have you been working on Astral?

This is amazing! Running Minecraft on your own hobby OS is a huge technical achievement. Love seeing projects that combine low-level OS work with something fun and tangible like a game. Inspiring for anyone interested in OS dev!”
